tasks.title: Create My Products Page
tasks.description: Develop a responsive "My Products" page that displays a user's product catalog with filtering, sorting, and basic CRUD operations.
tasks.details:
Implementation steps:
1. Create a new React component 'MyProductsPage' with responsive layout using CSS Grid/Flexbox
2. Implement product listing with card-based design showing:
   - Product image
   - Product name
   - Price
   - Stock status
   - Edit/Delete buttons
3. Add filtering functionality:
   - By category
   - By price range
   - By stock status
4. Implement sorting options:
   - By name
   - By price
   - By date added
5. Add CRUD operations:
   - Create new product form
   - Edit product modal
   - Delete confirmation dialog
6. Implement pagination or infinite scroll
7. Add loading states and error handling
8. Ensure mobile-responsive design
9. Implement search functionality

Technical considerations:
- Use React hooks for state management
- Implement proper form validation
- Add optimistic updates for better UX
- Include proper error boundaries
- Use proper accessibility attributes
- Implement proper image lazy loading
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Tests:
   - Test all CRUD operations
   - Verify filter functionality
   - Test sorting mechanisms
   - Validate form submissions
   - Test error handling

2. Integration Tests:
   - Verify API integration
   - Test data persistence
   - Validate state updates

3. UI/UX Testing:
   - Verify responsive design on multiple screen sizes
   - Test keyboard navigation
   - Verify all interactive elements are accessible
   - Test loading states
   - Verify proper error messages

4. Performance Testing:
   - Test with large datasets
   - Verify pagination/infinite scroll performance
   - Check image loading optimization

5. Cross-browser Testing:
   - Test on Chrome, Firefox, Safari
   - Verify mobile browser compatibility
